channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Artificial Intelligence: The Misconception of a Job Revolution
item.description: Artificial intelligence, despite its growing presence in various sectors, is unlikely to revolutionize jobs. Experts warn of wasted investments and potential economic harm.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, NewsNation

item.title: NYT Strands today — hints, answers and spangram for Saturday, October 5 (game #216)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.
item.dc:creator: marc.mclaren@futurenet.com (Marc McLaren), TechRadar

item.title: Node.js previews network inspection support
item.description: Node.js v20.18.0, a just-introduced update to the Long-Term Support (LTS) version of the popular asynchronous, event-driven JavaScript runtime, features experimental network inspection support. Introduced October 3, Node.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Civilization 7 makers work with Shawnee to bring sincere representation of the tribe to the game
item.description: MIAMI, Okla. (AP) — Shawnee Tribe Chief Ben Barnes grew up playing video games, including “probably hundreds of hours” colonizing a distant planet in the 1999 title Sid Meier's Alpha Centauri.
item.dc:creator: GRAHAM LEE BREWER and MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: EU Court Rules Against Meta's Use of Personal Data for Advertising
item.description: The European Union's top court has made a ruling against social media company Meta, stating that personal data obtained outside its platforms cannot be used for personalized advertising under the bloc's strict data privacy rules.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Why airlines are turning to Starlink for in-flight Wi-Fi
item.description: Last week, Air France was the latest major airline to announce it will be moving its in-flight Wi-Fi to the Starlink network, offering it for free to members of its frequent flier program.
item.dc:creator: Jack Kuhr, Fast Company

item.title: Google says it will stop linking to New Zealand news if a law passes forcing it to pay for content
item.description: WELLINGTON, New Zealand (AP) — Google said Friday it will stop linking to New Zealand news content and will reverse its support of local media outlets if the government passes a law forcing tech companies to pay for articles displayed on their platforms.
item.dc:creator: CHARLOTTE GRAHAM-McLAY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Why cloud security outranks cost and scalability
item.description: According to a study by Akamai Technologies, 87% of digital-native businesses (which seems to be a term specific to Asia/Pacific) now prioritize security over cost and scalability when selecting a cloud provider.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: AWS, 아마존 베드록 국내 정식 출시 “서울 리전에서 지원”
item.description: 아마존웹서비스(이하 AWS)가 3일 AWS 아시아 태평양(서울) 리전의 아마존 베드록(Amazon Bedrock)을 정식 출시한다고 발표했다. 아마존 베드록은 생성형 인공지능(AI) 애플리케이션을 구축하고 확장하려는 사용자가 특정 용도에 적합한 고성능 파운데이션 모델(FM) 및 거대언어모델(LLM)을 쉽게 찾고 접근할 수 있도록 하는 서비스다. AWS는 2023년부터 일부 지역을 시작으로 해당 서비스를 제공해오고 있다.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Google CEO eyeing electricity from nuclear plants for its data centers
item.description: Google CEO Sundar Pichai is considering using electricity from nuclear plants to power his company’s data centers, as the tech giant contends with the expansive energy demands of artificial intelligence (AI).
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: How to use extension methods in C#
item.description: In the C# programming language, extension methods enable you to extend the functionality of existing types without modifying them or deriving new types from them using inheritance.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: ChatGPT maker OpenAI raises $6.6 billion in fresh funding as it moves away from its nonprofit roots
item.description: OpenAI says it has raised $6.6 billion in venture capital investments as part of a broader shift by the ChatGPT maker away from its nonprofit roots.
item.dc:creator: Matt O'Brien, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Bank of America is having service issues and account access problems: Downdetector
item.description: A message on the Bank of America app states, “Accounts Temporarily Unavailable. Some accounts and/or balances are temporarily unavailable.
item.dc:creator: Matthew Euzarraga, NewsNation

item.title: CISA faces challenges to sharing cyber threat information
item.description: The IG said CISA made some good improvements to the Automated Indicator Sharing program in recent years. The post CISA faces challenges to sharing cyber threat information first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Michele Sandiford, Federal News Network

item.title: Network jobs watch: Hiring, skills and certification trends
item.description: Network and infrastructure roles continue to shift as enterprises adopt technologies such as AI-driven network operations, multicloud networking, zero trust network access (ZTNA), and SD-WAN.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: IBM opens first quantum computing center in Europe
item.description: IBM unveiled its first IBM Quantum Data Center outside the United States – and its second ever – in Ehningen, Germany.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Tesla posts first quarterly increase in deliveries, but shares slump with investors hoping for more
item.description: Low interest financing, sweet lease deals, price cuts and free charging boosted Tesla’s global deliveries in the third quarter, the first increase this year for the electric vehicle maker.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Musk sending Starlink terminals to storm-ravaged North Carolina
item.description: SpaceX CEO Elon Musk said Tuesday the aerospace company is sending more Starlink terminals to North Carolina following the widespread devastation of Hurricane Helene.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Docker tutorial: Get started with Docker
item.description: Containers are a lightweight way to make application workloads portable, like a virtual machine but without the overhead and bulk typically associated with VMs. With containers, you can package apps and services and move them freely between physical, virtual, or cloud environments.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: JDK 24: The new features in Java 24
item.description: Java Development Kit (JDK) 23 having arrived September 17, work already has begun on JDK 24, with three features so far proposed for the release: warnings to prepare developers for future restrictions on the use of JNI (Java Native Interface) and a late barrier expansion for the G1 garbage collector
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Details from New Mexico's lawsuit against Snap show site failed to act on reports of sextortion
item.description: Snapchat failed to act on “rampant” reports of child grooming, sextortion and other dangers to minors on its platform, according to a newly unredacted complaint against the company filed by New Mexico's attorney general. Attorney General Raúl Torrez filed the original complaint on Sept.
item.dc:creator: BARBARA ORTUTAY, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: iPhone stuck in SOS mode? Here's how to get out of it
item.description: There are ongoing reports of a widespread outage impacting multiple cellphone and internet providers Monday morning. According to Downdetector.com, AT&T, Verizon and T-Mobile users have all experienced issues.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, NewsNation

item.title: New Jersey offshore wind farm clears big federal hurdle amid environmental concerns
item.description: SEA GIRT, N.J. (AP) — The federal government gave a key approval Tuesday to an offshore wind farm in New Jersey, even as residents in the town where its power cable would come ashore worry it could go through underground toxic waste that's still being cleaned up. The U.S.
item.dc:creator: WAYNE PARRY, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Beware of the new sneaky parking QR code scam
item.description: While you may feel pretty sharp at spotting online fraud, there's a sneaky new scam involving QR codes and parking meters across the country affecting even the most cautious people.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Lionsgate's bold move into AI is about to change filmmaking forever
item.description: Lionsgate's revolutionary move to partner with tech company Runway to integrate AI into its production process is going to take the film industry by storm.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
